task_completion.description: Set the location to Longyearbyen, Svalbard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium's Location window (F6) is open, showing 'Longyearbyen' or coordinates ~78.22° N, ~15.62° E.

task_completion.description: Configure the display settings as requested.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium sky view shows an azimuthal grid, cardinal direction letters (N, S, E, W), a visible landscape (ground), and a black sky (atmosphere disabled) even during daytime.

task_completion.description: Save the configured settings as default.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium's Configuration window (F2) is open on the Main tab, with the 'Save settings' button visible or being clicked.

task_completion.description: Document the Polar Night on the Winter Solstice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium's Date/Time window shows 2024-12-21 around 12:00 UTC. The Sun is selected (crosshairs) and centered in the view, appearing below the horizon.

task_completion.description: Document the Midnight Sun on the Summer Solstice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium's Date/Time window shows 2024-06-21. There is evidence of the time being set to 00:00, 06:00, 12:00, and 18:00 UTC, with the Sun selected and centered, always appearing above the horizon.

task_completion.description: Save all screenshots to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window shows the directory ~/Pictures/stellarium/ containing at least 5 screenshot files.
A text editor is open showing the file 'arctic_lesson_plan.txt' saved to the Desktop. The text mentions 'Longyearbyen' and explains the Sun's visibility relative to the horizon on both solstices.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Stellarium GUI to change settings and take screenshots.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Stellarium application open with its menus, dialogs, and sky view being used, rather than just terminal commands editing config files.

integrity.description: Screenshots saved are actual captures of the Stellarium view.
integrity.visual_evidence: The files in ~/Pictures/stellarium/ have thumbnails or are opened to reveal actual Stellarium sky views matching the task requirements.

integrity.description: The lesson plan contains original explanatory text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in arctic_lesson_plan.txt is written out as an educational summary, not just a direct copy-paste of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Location: Longyearbyen (~78.22° N, ~15.62° E). Required display settings: Atmosphere OFF, Landscape ON, Azimuthal Grid ON, Cardinal Points ON. Required outputs: At least 5 screenshots in /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/ and a text file at /home/ga/Desktop/arctic_lesson_plan.txt mentioning Longyearbyen and horizon observations.
